rules.description: Authorization failure in a cross-contract call (caller and callee identified from diagnostic events)
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because contract {{.Caller}} invoked contract {{.Callee}} which lacked the required authorization.

rules.description: Authorization failure with a single contract identified from diagnostic events
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because contract {{.Callee}} could not satisfy an authorization check.

rules.description: Authorization failure with no contract context
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} due to an authorization failure; a required signature or auth entry was absent or invalid.

rules.description: Both CPU and memory budgets exhausted
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because it exhausted both the CPU instruction budget and the memory allocation budget during contract execution. Budget used: CPU {{.CPUUsed}}/{{.CPULimit}} ({{printf "%.1f" .CPUUsagePercent}}%), Memory {{.MemUsed}}/{{.MemLimit}} ({{printf "%.1f" .MemoryUsagePercent}}%). {{.Remediation}}

Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because the contract execution exceeded the Soroban CPU instruction budget. Budget used: {{.CPUUsed}}/{{.CPULimit}} instructions ({{printf "%.1f" .CPUUsagePercent}}%). {{.Remediation}}

Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because the contract execution exceeded the Soroban memory allocation budget. Budget used: {{.MemUsed}}/{{.MemLimit}} bytes ({{printf "%.1f" .MemoryUsagePercent}}%). {{.Remediation}}

rules.description: Account or contract held insufficient balance for a transfer
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because an account or contract held insufficient balance to cover the requested transfer.

rules.description: Contract storage is full or the per-transaction storage entry limit was exceeded
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because the Soroban contract storage is full or the per-transaction storage entry limit was exceeded. To resolve this: archive unused ledger entries, reduce the number of keys written in a single transaction, or split the operation across multiple transactions.

rules.description: A single ledger entry value exceeds the maximum allowed size
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because a ledger entry exceeded the maximum allowed size. Reduce the amount of data stored in a single storage key, or split large values across multiple keys with smaller payloads.

rules.description: Required ledger entry or contract storage key was absent
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because a required ledger entry or contract storage key was not present at execution time.

rules.description: The transaction footprint (set of ledger keys read or written) exceeds the per-transaction limit
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} because the transaction's ledger footprint (the set of keys it reads or writes) exceeded the per-transaction limit. Reduce the number of storage keys accessed in a single transaction, or break the operation into smaller batches.

rules.description: Fatal WASM trap caused by an unhandled panic or explicit unreachable instruction
rules.template: Transaction {{.TxHash}} failed on {{.Network}} due to a fatal WASM trap inside the contract, typically caused by an unhandled panic or an explicit unreachable instruction.
